title: IRL_Time
description: a simple mod for displaying local time in game
body:
simple mod for displaying local time in game,
no tinkering required.

# **Displays your actual real-world time!**


- **12h or 24h format**

  ![time display 24 hour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/271675b0132a9b130123dc7ed05ecdfd334b40e2_0.webp)

  ![time display 12 hour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec78a24d55f0bde4d63d56e6c9130486710e2d33.png)


- **Optional seconds**

  ![time display seconds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/655bf88cd85d061beb4144242ab989ffb3197569_0.webp)


- **Smart positioning that adjusts around potion effects**

  ![time display effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7e4c38a79ad9e7b28a058cfae669374fef6ea45.png)

- **settings menu for configuration**
  
  ![settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66e56e708677c4059e4bc9bba82dbaabb7446a45_0.webp)


Installation
=

● Install Fabric Loader

● Install Fabric API

● Install Mod Menu

● Download The latest stable version of IRL-Time

● Place the .jar inside your mods folder: 
```
%appdata% → .minecraft → mods → <irltime-X.jar>
```
